warscrolls.name: Arch-Kavalos Zandtos
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Cavalry, Ward (6+), Relentless Discipline (7), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

melee.name: Kavalos Steed’s Hooves, Teeth and Barbed Tails

abilities.name: Unstoppable Charge
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick each enemy unit in combat with it to be the targets.
abilities.effect: The targets have **STRIKE-LAST** for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Still Their Breath!
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly **non-HERO OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS CAVALRY** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Spend 1 **relentless discipline** point. If this unit is in combat, no **relentless discipline** points are spent. The target's melee weapons have **Charge (+ 1 Damage)** for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Arkhan the Black, Mortarch of Sacrament
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Warmaster, Unique, Hero, Monster, Wizard (3), Fly, Ward (6+), Relentless Discipline (3), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of **Razarak’s Ebon Claws** is 3.

abilities.name: Curse of Years
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect:
Roll 10 dice. For each 6:

• Give the target 1 **necrotic withering** point.
• Roll an extra dice.

For each 5+ on those extra dice, repeat the above bullet points, Then, do the same for each 4+ and then each 3+. Finally, for each 2+, give the target 1 **necrotic withering** point (do not roll any extra dice).

After a roll, if the target has 8 or more **necrotic withering** points, it is automatically destroyed. Otherwise, after the last roll, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the number of **necrotic withering** points it has. Then, those **necrotic withering** points are lost.

abilities.name: The Doom of Traitors
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
abilities.effect:
Roll a D3. Add 1 to the roll if the target is a **WIZARD** or **PRIEST.** On a 2+, add an amount equal to the roll to the Attacks characteristic of this unit's **Razarak's Ebon Claws** for the rest of the phase, but while this unit is in combat with the target, all attacks made with that weapon this phase must target that enemy unit.

**Designer's Note:** *If the target is a* **WIZARD** *or* **PRIEST,** *this ability cannot fail; however, you still need to roll to determine the number of extra attacks it generates.*

abilities.name: The Staff of Spirits
abilities.effect: Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit. Each time this unit successfully casts a spell, **Heal (1)** this unit after that **SPELL** ability has been resolved.

abilities.name: Mortarch of Sacrament
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn, Reaction: Opponent declared a **SPELL** ability for a unit within 18" of this uni
abilities.effect: Roll 2D6. If the roll exceeds the casting roll for the spell, then the spell is unbound, its effect is not resolved and that **SPELL** ability cannot be used by enemy units until the start of your next turn.

warscrolls.name: Bone-tithe Nexus
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Faction Terrain, Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Deadly Aura
abilities.effect:
Enemy units cannot be set up within **X**" of this terrain feature, where **X** is determined by the current battle round, as follows:

Battle Round - **X**
1 - 9"
2 - 12"
3 - 15"
4 - 18"
5 - 21"

warscrolls.name: Bone-tithe Shrieker
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Fly, Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: No Escape
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from ward rolls for enemy units while they are within 12" of this **MANIFESTATION**.

warscrolls.name: Gothizzar Harvester
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: War Machine, Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Repair Construct
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit is **full,** pick a visible friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Return 1 slain model to the target unit. If the target has a Health characteristic of 1 return 3 slain models to it instead. Then, this unit is **empty.**

abilities.name: Bone Harvest
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
abilities.effect: Roll a dice for each enemy unit that has been destroyed this battle. Add 1 to each roll if this unit used a **FIGHT** ability this turn. If any of the rolls are a 4+, this unit is **full.**

abilities.name: Bone Cage
abilities.effect: This unit is either **full** or **empty.** It starts the battle **full.**

warscrolls.name: Immortis Guard
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Immortal Bulwark
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit and that charged this turn to be the target.
abilities.effect: Other than the **Companion** weapon ability, weapon abilities for the target's combat attacks have no effect for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Kainan's Reapers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Infantry, Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers, Mortisan

abilities.name: Nadirite Bow
abilities.declare: If this unit’s **Nohem** is on the battlefield, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 4+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.

abilities.name: Mir Kainan
abilities.effect: While this unit’s **Mir Kainan** is on the battlefield, it has **WIZARD (1)**.

warscrolls.name: Katakros, Mortarch of the Necropolis
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Warmaster, Unique, Hero, Infantry, Ward (6+), Relentless Discipline (10), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the number after its **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** keyword is 4.

abilities.name: Mortarch of the Necropolis
abilities.effect: Add 3 to the control scores of visible friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** units that have used any **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** abilities this turn.

abilities.name: Supreme Lord of the Bonereaper Legions
abilities.declare: If this unit is not in combat, pick a visible friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit wholly within 12" of this unit that is in combat and has not used a **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** ability this phase to be the target.
abilities.effect: Spend a number of **relentless discipline** points equal to the target's Health characteristic. If the target is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend an additional **relentless discipline** point. The target can use 2 **FIGHT** abilities this phase. After the first is used, however, the target has **STRIKE-LAST** for the rest of the turn. In addition, the target cannot use **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** abilities for the rest of the phase.

abilities.name: You Dare?!
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Start of Any Turn
abilities.declare: This unit can only use this ability if at least half of the units from your starting army have been destroyed.
abilities.effect:
For the rest of the battle round:
• Add 5 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit's **Inda-Khaat**.
• Add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this unit's **The Shield Immortis**.
• This unit cannot use the 'Supreme Lord of the Bonereaper Legions' ability.

abilities.name: Aviarch Spymaster
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, the target cannot use commands for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Kavalos Deathriders
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Cavalry, Champion, Standard Bearer (1/5), Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Deathrider Wedge
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the enemy target. Then, you can pick a friendly **Liege-Kavalos** within this unit's combat range to be the friendly target.
abilities.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the enemy target. Inflict an additional D3 mortal damage on the enemy target if you picked a friendly target. Then, this unit and the friendly target (if any) can move 10". They can move through the combat ranges of enemy units but cannot end that move in combat.

warscrolls.name: Kavalos War Chariot
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: War Machine, Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Scything Assault
abilities.declare: If this unit charged this turn, pick an enemy unit in combat with it to be the target.
abilities.effect: Inflict D3 mortal damage on the target. Then, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again within 1" of the target.

abilities.name: Pinning Attacks
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Shooting Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect:
Roll a dice. On a 3+:
• Inflict 1 mortal damage on the target.
• The target cannot make pile-in moves for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Liege-Kavalos
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Cavalry, Ward (6+), Relentless Discipline (6), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

melee.name: Kavalos Steed’s Hooves, Teeth and Barbed Tails

abilities.name: Master of Cavalry
abilities.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a **FIGHT** ability for this unit
abilities.effect: Pick a friendly **Kavalos Deathriders** unit that has not used a **FIGHT** ability this turn and is within this unit's combat range to be the target. The target can be picked to use a **FIGHT** ability immediately after the **FIGHT** ability used by this unit has been resolved. If it is picked to do so, add 1 to hit rolls for the target's combat attacks for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Deathrider Commander
abilities.effect: This unit and visible friendly **Kavalos Deathriders** units wholly within 12" of this unit can move 12" instead of 10" when they use the 'Deathrider Wedge' ability.

warscrolls.name: Liege-Kavalos on War Chariot
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, War Machine, Ward (6+), Relentless Discipline (6), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Masterful Charioteer
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit is in combat and has charged this turn, pick this unit and up to 2 visible friendly **Kavalos War Chariots** that have charged this turn, that are wholly within 12" of this unit and that are in combat to be the targets.
abilities.effect: Each target has **WARD (5+)** for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Grind Them to Dust
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase
abilities.declare: If this unit is in combat, pick this unit and up to 2 visible friendly **Kavalos War Chariots** wholly within 12" of this unit and in combat to be the targets.
abilities.effect:
For each target:
• Make a pile-in move.
• Then, pick an enemy unit in combat with the target and roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on that enemy unit equal to the roll.

warscrolls.name: Liege-Mortek
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Infantry, Ward (6+), Relentless Discipline (5), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Clinical Efficiency
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a **FIGHT** ability for this unit
abilities.effect:
Pick a visible friendly **Mortek Guard, Mortek Triaxes** or **Mortek Crawler** unit that has not used an **ATTACK** ability this phase and is wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. Immediately after the **FIGHT** ability used by this unit has been resolved, the target can be picked to use either a **SHOOT** ability as if it were your shooting phase or a **FIGHT** ability. If it is picked to do so:

• Add 1 to hit rolls for the target's attacks for the rest of the turn.
• The target's ranged weapons (if any) have **Shoot in Combat** for the rest of the turn.
• If the target uses a **SHOOT** ability and is not in combat, all of its shooting attacks must target units in combat with this unit.

warscrolls.name: Morghast Archai
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Fly, Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Ebon-wrought Armour
abilities.effect: This unit has **WARD (3+)** against damage points inflicted by **SPELL** abilities, **PRAYER** abilities and abilities used by **MANIFESTATIONS**.

abilities.name: Discharge Armour
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD** wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to casting rolls for the target for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Morghast Harbingers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Fly, Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Harbingers of Death
abilities.effect: Add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making charge rolls for this unit, to a maximum of 3.

warscrolls.name: Mortek Crawler
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: War Machine, Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Deathly Barrage
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a **SHOOT** ability for this unit
abilities.effect: After that **SHOOT** ability has been resolved, if all of this unit's attacks targeted the same enemy unit, roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if this unit is wholly within 12" of a friendly **Mortisan Ossifector**, and add 1 to the roll if any other friendly **Mortek Crawlers** picked that enemy unit to be the target of all of their shooting attacks this turn. On a 4+, the target has **STRIKE-LAST** for the rest of the turn.

abilities.name: Cursed Stele
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn {Army), Your Shooting Phase
abilities.effect:
For the rest of the turn:
• This unit's ranged weapons have **Anti-FACTION TERRAIN (+1 Rend).**
• Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of this unit's ranged weapons for attacks that target faction terrain features.

warscrolls.name: Mortek Guard
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Standard Bearer (1/10), Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Shields of the Legion
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Phase (Army), Reaction: Opponent declared an **ATTACK** ability that targeted a visible **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit within this unit's combat range
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks made as part of that **ATTACK** ability that target that friendly unit.

warscrolls.name: Mortek Triaxes
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Atavistic Nightmares
abilities.effect:
While any of this unit's **Balefire Braziers** are next to an enemy unit, subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy units within that enemy unit's combat range.

If an ability would heal or return slain models to an enemy unit while any of this unit's **Balefire Braziers** are next to it, that ability does not heal or return any slain models to it. Instead, place those **Balefire Braziers** next to this unit.

abilities.name: Cursed Flames
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a **SHOOT** ability for this unit
abilities.effect: After that **SHOOT** ability has been resolved, if all of this unit's attacks targeted the same enemy unit and this unit has any **Balefire Braziers** next to it, place 1 of those **Balefire Braziers** next to that enemy unit.

abilities.name: Balefire Braziers
abilities.effect: This unit's **Balefire Braziers** are tokens. There are 2 **Balefire Braziers** for every 10 models in this unit. After setting up this unit on the battlefield for the first time, place its **Balefire Braziers** next to it.

warscrolls.name: Mortis Reapers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: No Escaping the Tithe
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Movement Phase
abilities.declare: If there are no enemy units within 6" of this unit, pick a terrain feature within 3" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Remove this unit from the battlefield and set it up again wholly within 3" of the target and more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Necrocaches
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
abilities.declare: Pick each enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the targets.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. Then, this unit can move 6". It can move through the combat ranges of enemy units but cannot end that move in combat.

warscrolls.name: Mortisan Boneshaper
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Ward (6+), Relentless Discipline (2), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Boneshaper
abilities.declare: If this unit is not in combat, pick a friendly **Mortek Guard** or **Mortek Triaxes** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
abilities.effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of this unit and not in combat.

abilities.name: Legion Quartermaster
abilities.effect: Each time a friendly **non-HERO OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the 'Rally' command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.

warscrolls.name: Mortisan Ossifector
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Fly, Ward (6+), Relentless Discipline (2), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Refined Creations
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **Mortek Crawler, Gothizzar Harvester, Morghast Archai** or **Morghast Harbingers** unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target’s weapons until the start of your next turn.

warscrolls.name: Mortisan Soulmason
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (2), Infantry, Ward (6+), Relentless Discipline (2), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Soul-guide
abilities.declare: Pick a visible friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit wholly within 12" of the caster to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: The target has **STRIKE-FIRST** for the rest of the turn.

warscrolls.name: Mortisan Soulreaper
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Fly, Ward (6+), Relentless Discipline (2), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Soulreaper
abilities.effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for combat attacks made by enemy units while they are in combat with this unit.

abilities.name: Necrotic Blast
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick each enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the targets.
abilities.effect: Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. After this ability has been resolved, you gain a number of **relentless discipline** points equal to the number of total damage points allocated by this ability this turn.

warscrolls.name: Nagash, Supreme Lord of the Undead
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Warmaster, Unique, Hero, Monster, Wizard (9), Fly, Ward (5+),Relentless Discipline (3), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, subtract 3 from its power level.

abilities.name: Hand of Dust
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), End of Any Turn
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy **HERO** or **MONSTER** in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Hide a dice in one of your hands or under one of two appropriate containers. Your opponent must pick one of your hands or containers. If they pick the one hiding the dice, this ability has no effect. If they pick the empty one, the target is automatically destroyed.

abilities.name: Supreme Lord of the Undead
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Your Hero Phase
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly non-**HERO** non-**UNIQUE DEATH** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
abilities.effect: Set up a replacement unit identical to the target wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Invocation of Nagash
abilities.declare: This unit can cast this spell more than once per phase. Pick a visible unit wholly within 18" of this unit that has not been picked to be the target of this spell this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect:
If the target is an enemy unit, inflict D3 mortal damage on it. If the target is a friendly **DEATH** unit, pick 1 of the following effects:

• Return a number of slain models to the target unit with a combined Health characteristic of up to 3.
• The target has **WARD (5+)** until the start of your next turn.

abilities.name: The Staff of Power
abilities.effect: Add 2 to casting rolls for this unit while it has not miscast any spells this turn. If this unit miscasts a spell, ignore the restriction that would stop this unit from casting any more spells this turn.

warscrolls.name: Necropolis Stalkers
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Fourfold Slayers
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
abilities.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in the target unit. For each 6, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target. If this unit has 3 or more models, inflict 1 mortal damage on the target for each 5+ instead.

warscrolls.name: Nightmare Predator
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Fly, Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Death Incarnate
abilities.effect: If this **MANIFESTATION** was destroyed or banished this turn and the unit that summoned it is on the battlefield, roll a dice. Add 1 to the roll if any enemy models were slain by this **MANIFESTATION'S** combat attacks this turn. On a 4+, set up this **MANIFESTATION** again, wholly within 12" of the unit that summoned it and more than 9" from all enemy units. That unit has summoned that **MANIFESTATION.**

warscrolls.name: Scourge of Ghyran Mortek Guard
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Infantry, Champion, Standard Bearer (1/10), Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Shields of the Legion
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Phase (Army), Reaction: A friendly OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WAR MACHINE, MONSTER or MORTISAN unit within this unit’s combat range was targeted by an ATTACK ability
abilities.effect: For the rest of the phase, subtract 1 from the Rend characteristic of weapons used for attacks that target that friendly unit.

warscrolls.name: Scourge of Ghyran Mortisan Boneshaper
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Hero, Wizard (1), Infantry, Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers, Mortisan

abilities.name: Boneshaper
abilities.declare: If this unit is not in combat, pick a friendly **Mortek Guard** unit that has been destroyed to be the target.
abilities.effect: Set up a replacement unit with half the number of models from the target unit (rounding up) wholly within 12" of this unit and more than 9" from all enemy units.

abilities.name: Legion Quartermaster
abilities.effect: Each time a friendly non-**HERO OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit wholly within 12" of this unit uses the ‘Rally’ command, you can make 3 additional rally rolls of D6.

warscrolls.name: Soulstealer Carrion
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Manifestation, Endless Spell, Fly, Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Aviarch Sentry
abilities.effect: Subtract 10 from the control scores of enemy units while they are within 6" of this **MANIFESTATION**.

warscrolls.name: Teratic Cohort
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Beast, Champion (1/8), Ward (6+), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Beast
abilities.effect: This unit has a maximum control score of 1.

abilities.name: Bone-deep Savagery
abilities.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Hero Phase
abilities.effect: This unit can move 3 ". If it can move into combat, it must. If it was in combat at the start of the move, it must end that move in combat.

abilities.name: Hunters Unleashed
abilities.effect: This unit can use the 'Normal Move' ability as if it were your movement phase.

warscrolls.name: Thanatek's Tithe
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Infantry, Wizard (1), Ward (6+), Relentless Discipline (2) Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Truebone Mastery
abilities.effect:
Spend any number of this unit’s **portions of truebone**. For each portion spent, pick 1 of the effects below. Each effect can be picked multiple times and the effects are cumulative.

• Add 1 to casting rolls for this unit for the rest of the turn.
• Add 1 to banishment rolls for this unit for the rest of the turn.
• Gain 1 **relentless discipline** point.
• Return 1 slain model to this unit

abilities.name: Seeker of Truebone
abilities.effect:
This unit can be picked to be the target of the ‘Immortal Elite’ ability as if it had the **HERO** keyword.

Each time a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit is destroyed, roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit gains 1 **portion of truebone**. Each time a visible friendly non-**BEAST OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit wholly within 12" of this unit is destroyed, this unit gains 1 **portion of truebone**.

warscrolls.name: Vokmortian, Master of the Bone-tithe
warscrolls.referenceKeywords: Unique, Hero, Wizard (2), Infantry, Ward (6+), Relentless Discipline (2), Death, Ossiarch Bonereapers

abilities.name: Mortal Contract
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of this unit to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time the target is picked to use a **CORE** ability, roll a D3 as a reaction. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. If the target is destroyed by this ability, do not resolve the effect of that **CORE** ability.

abilities.name: Voice of Nagash
abilities.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.
abilities.effect: The target cannot be picked to be the target of or be affected by any **non-CORE** abilities used by other enemy units for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Silent Empire
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.declare: Pick an enemy unit to be the target.
rules.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, until the start of your next turn, the target has a maximum control score of 1 while it is within neutral territory or your territory.

rules.name: Grim Sentinels
rules.effect: Melee weapons used by friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** units have **Anti-charge (+1 Rend)** while they are wholly within neutral territory or wholly within 6" of both enemy and friendly territory.

rules.name: Unfaltering Pace
rules.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a **RUN** ability for a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit
rules.effect: If you roll a 1-3 when determining the distance that unit can move, you can use a value of 4 instead.

rules.name: Disciplined Hekatoi
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly non-**HERO** non-**FLY OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS INFANTRY** unit to be the target.
rules.effect:
Pick 1 of the following effects to apply until the start of your next turn:

• The target has **WARD (5+)**.
• Add 1 to charge rolls for the target.
• Add 1 to wound rolls for the target’s attacks.
• The target’s melee weapons have **Anti-charge (+1 Rend)**.

rules.name: Nadirite Wedge
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit that charged this turn to use this ability.
rules.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, this unit's melee weapons, including **Companion** weapons, have **Crit (2 Hits)** for the rest of the turn.

rules.name: Plentiful Bone
rules.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
rules.declare: Pick a friendly non-**UNIQUE OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD** to use this ability, then pick up to 3 visible friendly non-**FLY OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** units wholly within 12" of that **WIZARD** to be the targets.
rules.effect:
Roll a D3 for each target. On a 2+:
• If the target is damaged, **Heal (X)** the target where **X** is an amount equal to the roll.
• If the target is not damaged, return a number of slain models to it with a combined Health characteristic equal to or less than the roll.

spells.name: Bolster Creation
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, ignore the first damage point allocated to the target in each phase.

spells.name: Invigorate the Ranks
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the target’s melee weapons until the start of your next turn.

spells.name: Soul-Claim
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD** to cast this spell, then pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them to be the enemy target. Then, you can pick a visible friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit wholly within 12" of that **WIZARD** to be a friendly target. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect:
Inflict D3 mortal damage on the enemy target. If any models are slain by this ability, pick 1 of the following:

• **Heal (3)** the friendly target.
• Return a number of slain models to the friendly target with a combined Health characteristic of up to 3.

spells.name: Empower Nadirite Weapons
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect:
The target's melee weapons have **Crit (2 Hits)** until the start of your next turn. If all of the target's non-**Companion** melee weapons had **Crit (2 Hits)** when they were picked to be the target of this ability, the target's combat attacks score critical hits on unmodified hit rolls of 5+ until the start of your next turn instead.

Friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** units can be affected by this ability multiple times.

spells.name: Immolating Flames
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit wholly within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, each time a model in the target unit is slain by a combat attack and that model was in combat with the attacking unit, roll a number of dice equal to the target's Health characteristic. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the attacking unit after the **FIGHT** ability has been resolved.

spells.name: Drain Vitality
spells.declare: Pick a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD** to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Until the start of your next turn, subtract 1 from hit rolls for the target’s attacks and subtract 1 from save rolls for the target.

spells.name: Summon Bone-tithe Shrieker
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Bone‑tithe Shrieker** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Bone-tithe Shrieker** wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

spells.name: Summon Nightmare Predator
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Nightmare Predator** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Nightmare Predator** wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

spells.name: Summon Soulstealer Carrion
spells.declare: If there is not a friendly **Soulstealer Carrion** on the battlefield, pick a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS WIZARD** to cast this spell, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
spells.effect: Set up a **Soulstealer Carrion** wholly within 12" of the caster, visible to them and more than 9" from all enemy units.

artefacts.name: Gothizzar Cartouche
artefacts.declare: Pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of this unit to be the target.
artefacts.effect: Roll a dice. On a 3+, add 1 to hit rolls for combat attacks made by friendly **NULL MYRIAD** units that target that unit for the rest of the turn.

artefacts.name: Shard of Necris
artefacts.effect: If the unmodified hit roll for an attack that targets this unit is 1-4 and this unit did not charge in the same turn, the attack fails and the attack sequence ends.

artefacts.name: Blade of the Nadir
artefacts.effect: Pick 1 of this unit's non-**Companion** melee weapons. For the rest of the battle, each time you make an unmodified wound roll of 6 for a combat attack made with that weapon, inflict D3 mortal damage on the target of the attack after the **FIGHT** ability has been resolved.

artefacts.name: Amulet of Gnosis
artefacts.effect: No mortal damage is inflicted on friendly **OSSIARCH B0NEREAPERS** units by **RETREAT** abilities while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

artefacts.name: Helm of Tyranny
artefacts.effect: Subtract 3 from the control scores of enemy units while they are within 12" of this unit.

heroicTraits.name: Aura of Enervation
heroicTraits.effect: Subtract 1 from wound rolls for shooting attacks that target friendly **NULL MYRIAD** units while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

heroicTraits.name: Manufactured Mind
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle, Start of Battle Round
heroicTraits.effect: When picking a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS HERO** to be the target of the 'Immortal Elite' ability this battle round, you can pick a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS HERO** that has been destroyed.

heroicTraits.name: Immaculate Defender
heroicTraits.effect: Ignore the first damage point allocated to each friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS INFANTRY** unit in the combat phase while they are wholly within 12" of this unit.

heroicTraits.name: Imperious Will
heroicTraits.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a **FIGHT** ability for a non-**HERO OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit wholly within 12" of this unit
heroicTraits.effect: Pick an enemy unit in combat with that non-**HERO** unit and that did not charge this turn to be the target. Roll a D3. On a 2+, inflict an amount of mortal damage on the target equal to the roll. This unit can use this ability more than once per phase.

heroicTraits.name: Prevailing Tactician
heroicTraits.effect: If a friendly **Arch-Kavalos Zandtos** is not wholly within 12" of this unit, you gain 2 **relentless discipline** points.

other.name: Collect the Tithe
other.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Any Combat Phase
other.declare: Pick the **Gothizzar Harvester** in this Regiment of Renown to use this ability, then pick a non-**HERO INFANTRY** unit (friendly or enemy) within its combat range to be the target.
other.effect: Roll a dice. If the roll equals or exceeds the target’s Health characteristic, 1 model in the target unit is slain, then give the unit using this ability 1 **bone-tithe point**.

other.name: Rebuild On The March
other.declare: Pick the **Gothizzar Harvester** in this Regiment of Renown to use this ability if it has 6 **bone-tithe points**. Then, pick another unit in this Regiment of Renown that has been destroyed to be the target.
other.effect: Reset the **Gothizzar Harvester**’s **bone-tithe points** to 0. Then, set up a replacement of the target unit with half the number of models (rounding up) wholly within 9" of the **Gothizzar Harvester** and more than 9" from all enemy units.

other.name: Soul Tax
other.declare:
Pick the **Mortisan Ossifector** in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, then:

• Pick a friendly unit, excluding units in this Regiment of Renown, to be the target.
• Pick a unit in this Regiment of Renown to be the **recipient**.

The target and the **recipient** must be wholly within 12" of and visible to the caster. Then, make a casting roll of 2D6.
other.effect:
Until the start of your next turn:

• The target has a maximum control score of 1.
• Add 1 to hit rolls and wound rolls for the **recipient**’s combat attacks.

other.name: The Decree of Nagash
other.declare: Pick the friendly **Vokmortian** in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of them to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
other.effect:
For the rest of the turn, each time your opponent declares a **FIGHT** ability for the target, unless they spend 1 command point as a reaction, that **FIGHT** ability has no effect.

**Designer's Note:** *That* **FIGHT** *ability does not count as a command.*

other.name: Reinforce Pavise
other.declare: If the **Mortek Crawler** in this Regiment of Renown is wholly within 12" of and visible to the friendly **Mortisan Ossifector** in this Regiment of Renown, pick that **Mortisan Ossifector** to cast this spell, pick that **Mortek Crawler** to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
other.effect: Until the start of your next turn, the target has **WARD (5+).**

other.name: Bulwark of the Necropolis
other.declare: Pick an enemy unit in combat with a unit in this Regiment of Renown to be the target.
other.effect: Subtract 2D6 from the target’s control score for the rest of the turn.

other.name: Skeletal Splintering
other.declare: This spell can be cast by the same **WIZARD** more than once per phase. Pick the **Arkhan the Black** in this Regiment of Renown to cast this spell, pick a visible enemy unit within 18" of them that has not been picked to be the target of this spell this turn to be the target, then make a casting roll of 2D6.
other.effect: Roll a number of dice equal to the number of models in the target unit. For each 5+, inflict 1 mortal damage on that unit.

other.name: Unholy Sacraments
other.effect: Add 1 to the number of dice rolled when making banishment rolls for the **Arkhan the Black** in this Regiment of Renown, to a maximum of 3.

battleTraits.name: Arcane Immunity
battleTraits.effect: Friendly **NULL MYRIAD** units have **WARD (4+)** against damage points inflicted by **SPELL** abilities, **PRAYER** abilities and abilities used by **MANIFESTATIONS.**

battleTraits.name: First of the Mortarchs
battleTraits.effect:
Each time you make a casting roll for a friendly **Arkhan the Black,** if all the following are true, that spell cannot be unbound:

• The unmodified casting roll contains 2 or more results of the same value.
• The casting roll equals or exceeds the spell's casting value.
• The spell is not miscast.

battleTraits.name: Supernatural Absorption
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Your Hero Phase
battleTraits.declare: Pick an enemy **MANIFESTATION** within a friendly **NULL MYRIAD** unit's combat range to be the target.
battleTraits.effect:
Roll a dice. On a 3+:

• The target is banished and removed from play.
• If that friendly unit is damaged, **Heal (X)** that friendly unit, where **X** is the target's Health characteristic.
• If that friendly unit is not damaged, return a number of slain models to it with a combined Health characteristic of up to **X,** where **X** is the target's Health characteristic.

battleTraits.name: Immortal Elite
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round
battleTraits.declare: You must use this ability if there are any friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS HEROES** on the battlefield. Pick a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS HERO** to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: You gain a number of **relentless discipline** points equal to the number after the target's **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** keyword. At the end of the battle round, any unspent **relentless discipline** points are lost.

battleTraits.name: Remorseless March
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit that has not used a **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** ability this phase to use this ability.
battleTraits.effect: Spend 1 **relentless discipline** point. If that unit is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 **relentless discipline** points instead. Add 3" to the Move characteristic of that unit for the rest of the phase. That unit cannot use **RUN** abilities for the rest of the turn.

battleTraits.name: Impassive Retreat
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **OSSIARCH BONEREAPERS** unit that has not used a **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** ability this phase to use this ability.
battleTraits.effect: Spend 1 **relentless discipline** point. If that unit is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 **relentless discipline** points instead. For the rest of the turn, that unit can use **CHARGE** abilities even if it used a **RETREAT** ability in the same turn.

battleTraits.name: Ruthless Extermination
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Turn (Army), Reaction: You declared a **SHOOT** ability for a unit that has not used a **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** ability this phase
battleTraits.effect: Spend 1 **relentless discipline** point. If that unit is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 **relentless discipline** points instead. Subtract l from ward rolls for damage points inflicted by attacks made as part of that **SHOOT** ability.

battleTraits.name: Pitiless Assault
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Reaction: You declared a **FIGHT** ability for a unit that has not used a **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** ability this phase
battleTraits.effect: Spend 1 **relentless discipline** point. If that unit is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 **relentless discipline** points instead. Add 1 to wound rolls for attacks made as part of that **FIGHT** ability.

battleTraits.name: Inviolate Legions
battleTraits.effect: Spend 1 **relentless discipline** point. If that unit is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 **relentless discipline** points instead. That unit has **WARD (5+)** against damage points inflicted by attacks made as part of that **ATTACK** ability.

battleTraits.name: Praetorian Elite
battleTraits.phaseDetails: Once Per Battle Round (Army), Start of Battle Round
battleTraits.declare: You must use this ability if there are any friendly **LANCE OF OSSIA HEROES** on the battlefield. Pick a friendly **LANCE OF OSSIA HERO** to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: You gain a number of **relentless discipline** points equal to the number shown after the target's **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** keyword. At the end of the battle round, any unspent **relentless discipline** points are lost.

battleTraits.name: Kavalos Lance
battleTraits.effect: When a friendly **LANCE OF OSSIA** unit uses the 'Power Through' command, the target does not have to have a lower Health characteristic than that friendly unit.

battleTraits.name: Vengeful Outriders
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **LANCE OF OSSIA** unit that has not used a **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** ability this phase to be the target
battleTraits.effect: Spend 1 **relentless discipline** point. If the target is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 **relentless discipline** points instead. Add 2" to the target's Move characteristic for the rest of the phase.

battleTraits.name: Silent Menace
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **LANCE OF OSSIA** unit that has not used a **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** ability this phase to use this ability, then pick a visible enemy unit within 12" of it to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Spend 1 **relentless discipline** point. If the target is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 **relentless discipline** points instead. The target cannot use the 'Redeploy' command for the rest of the turn.

battleTraits.name: Fury of Zandtos
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **LANCE OF OSSIA** unit that charged this turn and that has not used a **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** ability this phase to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Spend 1 **relentless discipline** point. If the target is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 **relentless discipline** points instead. The target's melee weapons, including **Companion** weapons, have **Crit (2 Hits)** for the rest of the turn.

battleTraits.name: Blood-smeared Hooves
battleTraits.declare: Pick a friendly **LANCE OF OSSIA** unit that charged this turn and has not used a **RELENTLESS DISCIPLINE** ability this phase to be the target.
battleTraits.effect: Spend 1 **relentless discipline** point. If the target is reinforced and has more than half of its starting models, spend 2 **relentless discipline** points instead. Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of the target's weapons, including **Companion** weapons, for the rest of the turn.
